# Wire — Pipe — counter

> **Feature delivered — acceptance criteria.** Generated from the as-built BDD tests in

**1 scenario.**

## Scenario: three increments in one pipe read the running total, then INCRBY steps it

- **Given** an unset counter
- **When** the counter is incremented three times in one pipe
- **And** then stepped by ten and read back
- **Then** the three increments return 1, 2, 3 in order and INCRBY lands on 13
